name: seg1-anime
prompt: [CLOTHING ANCHOR] 主角林远穿深蓝色圆领卫衣（无logo无图案）、黑色休闲裤、白色运动鞋。此服装在整个视频中不变。[LIGHTING ANCHOR] 白天上午10点，室内充满自然日光。落地窗透进暖白色阳光，整体色调明亮通透。无人工补光、无霓虹。Genshin Impact 3D anime style. Bright co-working space, white long tables, green plants, floor-to-ceiling windows showing blue sky cityscape. Chinese man Lin Yuan, 28, short clean black hair, no glasses, square jaw, confident look, dark blue crew-neck sweatshirt, black pants, white sneakers, sits at desk typing on MacBook. Suddenly a translucent golden holographic system panel appears above the screen showing「检测到创业者基因觉醒，是否激活创业系统？」in Chinese. He frowns, looks around nervously to make sure nobody noticed, then curiously reaches out to tap「确认」. He mutters in Chinese: "我不是加班加傻了吧..." Sunlight streams across the desk. Normal speed, natural pacing. Chinese Mandarin dialogue.
